title: Tcard_X688B-H659ABCDEFGHIJKLMNO-R-GL-220216V638
description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: X688B-H659ABCDEFGHIJKLMNO-R-GL-220216V638
Reminding:
1.Upgraded to the latest Android R to provide users with the freshest experience.
2.Added personalized settings for Dark Theme. Users can select the time to enable Dark Theme.
3.Added quick start with fingerprint for XClone.
4.Added app hiding function in XHide.
5.Added Peek Proof function.
Fixed Issues:
1.Fixed the stability issue fed back by users.
2.Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
3.Visit the XCLUB (Infinix Help Station) for more information.
